title: Legal battle looms if Knysna is put under administration
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna council has mandated...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna council has mandated Speaker Mark Willemse (KIM) and Mayor Thando Matika (ANC), along with three senior municipal officials, to institute an urgent interdict against the Western Cape provincial executive should Knysna be placed under administration.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna council has mandated Speaker Mark Willemse (KIM) and Mayor Thando Matika (ANC), along with three senior municipal officials, to institute an urgent interdict against the Western Cape provincial executive should Knysna be placed under administration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The resolution was passed at a special council meeting on Friday 18 July - the deadline set by Western Cape local government MEC Anton Bredell for submissions from Knysna on his Intention to Intervene.","html":"The resolution was passed at a special council meeting on Friday 18 July - the deadline set by Western Cape local government MEC Anton Bredell for submissions from Knysna on his Intention to Intervene."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This legal route could follow if Bredell rejects the consolidated response which the council noted on Friday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mark Willemse","html":"Mark Willemse"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The motion was carried by majority vote (6 ANC, 1 EFF, 1 PBI and 2 KIM).","html":"The motion was carried by majority vote (6 ANC, 1 EFF, 1 PBI and 2 KIM)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Disputed","html":"Disputed"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The DA voted against the resolution (7). One DA vote, cast by a councillor attending virtually, was rejected by the speaker because it was cast too late.","html":"The DA voted against the resolution (7). One DA vote, cast by a councillor attending virtually, was rejected by the speaker because it was cast too late."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There were two abstentions (PA).","html":"There were two abstentions (PA)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week’s Knysna Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week’s Knysna Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
